action.description:
Introduced by Senators L. Johnson, Spreitzer, Smith, Wirch, Hesselbein and Larson; 
cosponsored by Representatives Haywood, Bare, Prado, Sinicki, DeSmidt, Stubbs, Doyle, Neubauer, Goodwin, Joers, Taylor, Kirsch, Sheehan, Mayadev, Snodgrass, Subeck, Moore Omokunde, Arney, Emerson, Miresse, Johnson, Phelps, Rivera-Wagner, Palmeri, Madison, Fitzgerald, Roe, Hysell, Brown, Udell, Tenorio, Andraca and Vining
